data.title: CCS Becomes First Chronic Care Management Organization To Deploy Enterprise-Wide Agentic AI To Better Serve the Complex Patient Journey
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, CCS, a prominent supplier of clinical services and home-delivered medical supplies for individuals with chronic illnesses, revealed it is the initial chronic care management entity to implement agentic AI throughout its operations. This strategic move aims to enhance patient services, especially during difficult periods such as insurance modifications and benefit adjustments. The adoption of advanced AI tools signifies a significant investment by CCS to optimize its enterprise operations.

data.title: Phillips & Cohen Associates Wins American Business Awards® for AI Implementation of the Year
data.description: Phillips & Cohen Associates, Ltd., a renowned company providing customer care and debt recovery solutions globally, has been honored with a Silver Stevie® Award in the AI Implementation of the Year category at The 24th Annual American Business Awards®. This recognition came after more than 3,600 nominations were reviewed, spanning organizations of various sizes and industries. The esteemed award acknowledges the company's excellence in incorporating artificial intelligence into its operations, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: reAlpha (Nasdaq: AIRE) Reports First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: As the spring homebuying season begins, Platform has expanded its service coverage and introduced a new Homebuying Hub. The Total Transaction Volume has seen a significant increase, more than doubling compared to the previous year.

data.title: Quantum Lifecycle Partners Launches Canada's Most Advanced Plastics Separation System for Electronics Plastics Recovery
data.description: In Toronto, Quantum Lifecycle Partners, the largest technology lifecycle provider in Canada, has unveiled its new Advanced Plastics Recovery Line at its facility. This new system, worth $4 million and integrated with Quantum's $10 million electronics processing infrastructure, signifies a notable advancement in Canada's capacity to process and extract value from end-of-life electronics plastics within the country. The cutting-edge technology utilizes float-sink separation techniques to effectively sort the mixed polym...

data.title: Kraig Biocraft Labs shows significant advancement in turning high spider silk cocoon output into reeled silk.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.3%, which is a significant drop from the previous quarter. This reduction in unemployment represents approximately 1.2 million people finding employment. Additionally, the report showed that the GDP has grown by 6.2% in the last quarter, exceeding economists' expectations. This growth in GDP indicates a strong and recovering economy. The report also highlighted that inflation remains steady at 2.5%, aligning with the target set by the government. Overall, the data suggests positive economic progress amidst the ongoing challenges.
Unique to reveal Q1 2026 financial results soon.

data.title: Profluent Announces Strategic Partnership with Lilly to Develop AI-Designed Recombinases for Genetic Medicine
data.description: Profluent, a leading AI company based in Emeryville, California, has revealed a significant collaboration with Eli Lilly and Company in a strategic research venture. The partnership aims to create and market custom site-specific recombinases designed to tackle diseases with critical unmet needs. This collaboration will center on advancing extensive, accurate DNA editing capabilities that are currently unattainable with traditional gene editing technologies. This collaboration signifies a key effort to address severe diseases through innovative genetic editing methods, potentially revolutionizing the healthcare sector.

data.title: Zilliant Survey: Executives Are Adjusting Prices More Than Ever but Losing Control of the Outcomes
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Zilliant, a leading pricing lifecycle management company, has unveiled its Pricing Without Control report, investigating pricing strategies of 300 senior executives in manufacturing and distribution sectors during economic uncertainty. The study highlights a significant disparity, as almost all companies are changing prices, yet only 50% are confident about comprehending the financial consequences. The research shows that 99% of companies modified prices to adapt to the volatile economic conditions.

data.title: Perfect Corp. Reports Unaudited Financial Results for the Three Months Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: In New York, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF), a prominent AI company providing solutions to beauty, fashion, and creative industries, revealed its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The unaudited report showed total revenue of $17.9 million for the quarter, up from $16.0 million in the previous year. Perfect Corp. specializes in AI and AR technology, catering to various sectors including beauty, fashion, photography, and videography.

data.title: Coforge Recognized as a Leader and Star Performer in Everest Group's Duck Creek Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026
data.description: Coforge, based in Princeton, New Jersey, has achieved recognition as a Leader and Star Performer in the 2026 Everest Group Duck Creek Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment. This marks a significant accomplishment for Coforge in the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Climb Bio, Inc. Announces $110.0 Million Private Placement
data.description: In Wellesley Hills, Mass., on April 28, 2026, Climb Bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLYM), a clinical-stage biotechnology firm focusing on therapeutics for immune-mediated disorders, disclosed a securities purchase deal with a limited number of institutional accredited investors. The agreement entails the sale of securities in a private placement, generating total gross earnings of around $110.0 million. This amount is before accounting for placement agent fees and other offering costs. The closure of the private placement is anticipated around April 29, 2026, pending the fulfillment of usual closing prerequisites.

data.title: Kandi Technologies Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Jinhua, China, on April 28, 2026, Kandi Technologies Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: KNDI) shared its financial performance for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. Kandi Technologies Group, Inc., known for its innovations in smart equipment and technology solutions, provided an overview of its annual earnings.

data.title: BLINDED ASSESSMENT OF ACTION3 STATISTICAL ASSUMPTIONS COMPLETE
data.description: A recent external statistical review of the ACTION3 data has successfully met its goal by verifying that the study maintains appropriate statistical power of over 90%. This ensures the ability to show a treatment impact on the primary endpoint of proteinuria. The verification provides confidence in the study's ability to demonstrate the desired effect if DMX-200 is used.
Gogo to announce Q1 2026 financial results on May 7th, 2026.

data.title: DoubleDown Interactive to Report 2026 First Quarter Results on May 12 and Host Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: South Korean company DoubleDown Interactive Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: DDI) will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 12, 2026. The announcement will be made after the market closes, with a conference call and webcast scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET (1:30 p.m. PT) on the same day. The call and webcast are open to the public, where DoubleDown management will discuss the financial results, provide a business update, and engage in a question-and-answer session.

data.title: Axogen, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: The company has increased its projected annual revenue growth to a minimum of 20%, equivalent to a total of $270 million.

data.title: adMarketplace Launches AI Discover Beta to Improve Consumer Discovery in AI Search
data.description: In New York on April 28, 2026, adMarketplace, a prominent Native Search™ advertising expert, revealed the introduction of its AI Discover Program's Beta version. This program aims to elevate AI chat ad interactions by incorporating pertinent, performance-oriented CPC ads. The initiative has successfully attracted new publisher collaborators, signifying a strategic move to enrich AI chat experiences. This innovative approach promises to enhance user engagement and drive notable results.

data.title: Homebuilder LGI Homes, Inc. boosts full-year margin guidance following strong Q1 2026 results.
data.description: In recent news, it has been reported that a total of 1,500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak of a rare virus in a specific region. Out of this number, 200 cases have been confirmed positive for the virus, with 30 individuals currently in critical condition. Health authorities are working diligently to contain the spread of the virus and provide necessary medical care to those affected. Additionally, a total of 500 individuals have been placed under quarantine as a precautionary measure. The situation is being closely monitored, and further updates will be provided as the investigation progresses.

data.title: Mars Accelerates Clean Energy Transition in Europe Through Landmark Agreement in Lithuania
data.description: Mars has signed a long-term power purchase agreement (PPA) to secure the majority output from the Skuodas Wind Farm in Lithuania. This project is anticipated to produce about 490 gigawatt-hours (GWh) of renewable electricity each year. This amount of renewable energy is estimated to help avoid around 120,000 metric tons of CO₂ emissions annually.

data.title: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Results Release and Conference Call
data.description: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 today. The company, listed as LIEN on NASDAQ, functions as a specialty finance company under the regulation of a business development company. The announcement was made in New York on April 28, 2026, without specifying the actual financial numbers.
